assessor_raw: Domain-adapted dense embeddings for support article retrieval: methodologically sound. Temporal split with product area stratification is appropriate. Weak-label audit calibrates label quality. Strict label (click + no rejection) reduces popularity bias. Both models receive equal tuning effort. NDCG@5 is appropriate for the 5-result deployment scenario. Secondary metrics (Spearman popularity correlation, per-area NDCG, BM25-to-dense overlap, coverage) comprehensively address confounds. Test set policy is rigorous (one pass). Scope appropriately bounded to same support environment. Verdict: defense_wins.
